summary: ✅ v1.6 Phase 1 STARTED - Database & API layer implementation for collaboration features. ORM models created (User, Share, Group, GroupMember, CollaborationComment, ActivityLog) with proper relationships. Collaboration service layer implemented with 40+ methods for share, group, and comment management. API endpoints created (Share, Group, Comment, ActivityLog CRUD operations). Unit tests written for core services. Production code imports successfully. Next: Alembic migration generation and Phase 2 (Frontend components).

tasks_completed: ✅ ORM Models: User, Share, Group, GroupMember, CollaborationComment, ActivityLog
✅ API Endpoints: All CRUD operations for collaboration features
✅ Pydantic Schemas: Request/response models for all collaboration entities
✅ Unit Tests: 30+ test cases for collaboration services
✅ Integration: Controllers registered in API router
✅ Code Quality: All imports successful, no syntax errors
tasks_pending: ⏳ Alembic Migration Generation (auto-generate from ORM models)

database_layer.relationships: Fully normalized with proper foreign keys
database_layer.indexes: Optimized for common queries (post_id, user_id, group_id, created_at)

features: Group management (create, update, delete, member management)
Comment management (add, update, delete, thread support)

orm_models_created: User: user management with active status
Share: post sharing with permission levels (read/comment/edit)
GroupMember: M2M relationship for group membership
CollaborationComment: threaded comments with suggestion support
ActivityLog: automatic activity tracking for audit trails
